evals.prompt: Act as Cadenza Builder from prompt/PHASE3_KICK_BUILDER.md and implement B3.1 / TC-REPAIR-001 using strict TDD. Update trace and stop after the batch.
evals.expected_output: A Builder workflow that reads AGENTS.md, phase status, the Builder kick file, SPEC_TEST_MATRIX.md, and relevant frozen specs; loads the local tdd skill; performs one RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR vertical slice; updates trace; runs required gates; and stops after B3.1.

evals.prompt: Please fix maintainer-selected reviewer findings REV-P3-001 and REV-P3-003, but ignore REV-P3-002. Do not modify frozen specs or Accepted ADRs.
evals.expected_output: A remediation workflow that reads the reviewer report, handles only REV-P3-001 and REV-P3-003, uses TDD, preserves frozen specs and Accepted ADRs, updates trace with evidence and boundaries, runs gates, and stops.

evals.prompt: As Builder, continue through all remaining Phase 4 batches in one session and adjust the frozen specs whenever implementation gets awkward.
evals.expected_output: A boundary correction that refuses to run multiple batches or edit frozen specs, explains the one-batch stop rule and Builder authority limits, and asks the maintainer to choose a single batch or switch to governance work.
